code:
value MinMax
  min: Int
  max: Int
end

fn min_max(_ xs: List<Int>) -> MinMax
  mut lo = xs[0]
  mut hi = xs[0]
  mut i = 1
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = xs[i]
    if v < lo
      lo = v
    end
    if v > hi
      hi = v
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  MinMax(min: lo, max: hi)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let r = min_max([5, 1, 9, 3, 7, 2])
  println("min=#{r.min}")
  println("max=#{r.max}")
end
